brief_html: Informs the client about an action in-game.
format:
(UINT16) Send interval
(UINT16) CRC-16 encryption

For each action:
(UINT8) Player number
(UINT16) Length of action data
(VOID) Action data
remarks_html:
Informs the client about an action in-game.

This is used when there is not enough room inside 0x0C W3GS_INCOMING_ACTION. If there are 1452 actions or more, then this packet should be used instead.
